# Proposal Spots

> A curated directory of the world's most romantic proposal locations, with destination guides, planning articles, budget breakdowns, and a step-by-step checklist.

Proposal Spots helps couples plan memorable marriage proposals. Browse hundreds of hand-picked outdoor spots, restaurant tables, and private settings across popular destinations — each with photos and context. Alongside the directory, the site publishes practical planning guides covering budget, timing, photographer hiring, and proposal formats.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.proposalspots.com/): Full directory of proposal spots, filterable by destination, setting, and budget
- [Destinations](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations): Overview of all destination guides
- [Proposal Checklist](https://www.proposalspots.com/checklist): Step-by-step proposal planning checklist
- [Budget Guide](https://www.proposalspots.com/budget-guide): How much a proposal costs and where to spend wisely
- [How It Works](https://www.proposalspots.com/how-it-works): How the directory and planning tools work
- [Inspiration](https://www.proposalspots.com/inspiration): Planning articles and real proposal stories

## Destination Guides

- [Greece](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/greece): Best proposal spots in Greece and Santorini. Top Santorini proposal spots include private caldera-edge terraces in Imerovigli, clifftop restaurant terraces above Fira, the Santo Wines terrace at Pyrgos, and private catamaran charters on the caldera. For a Greece proposal outside Santorini, Nafplio's Venetian harbour (Peloponnese), Mykonos Little Venice waterfront, and the Meteora rock-pillar viewpoints are strong alternatives. Covers Santorini proposal packages ($530 to $1,550 for the moment; $1,400 to $4,300 with cave suite and private dining), proposal photographer booking tips (3 to 6 months ahead for peak season), best times (May, June, September ideal; October underrated), golden-hour windows (7 to 8pm June/July, 6 to 7pm September/October), Oia versus Imerovigli comparison, private catamaran vs group cruise guidance, and a five-setting comparison table. Includes a twelve-question FAQ covering where to propose in Santorini, Greece outside Santorini, package costs, photographer hiring, catamaran proposals, and private terrace vs restaurant differences.
- [Italy](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/italy): Best proposal spots in Italy
- [Amalfi Coast](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/amalfi-coast): Best proposal spots on the Amalfi Coast
- [South of France](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/south-of-france): Best proposal spots in the South of France
- [Portugal](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/portugal): Best proposal spots in Portugal
- [Switzerland](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/switzerland): Best proposal spots in Switzerland, including the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise above Zermatt (3,883m), Grindelwald First ridge in the Bernese Oberland, Lake Lucerne at Brunnen, the Lavaux wine terraces above Lake Geneva, and Lauterbrunnen valley. Covers Switzerland proposal packages, photographer tips, best times (September ideal), and costs from $800.
- [Maldives](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/maldives): Best proposal spots in the Maldives
- [Bali](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/bali): Best proposal spots in Bali, including Uluwatu clifftops, Tegallalang rice terraces, Kelingking Beach on Nusa Penida, and private villa infinity pools in Ubud. Covers proposal packages, photographer tips, best times, and costs from $290.
- [Tulum](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/tulum): Best proposal spots in Tulum, Mexico
- [Costa Rica](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/costa-rica): Best proposal spots in Costa Rica, including the Monteverde cloud forest hanging bridges at dawn (6am private access via Selvatura Park), the cliff overlook above Playa Biesanz in Manuel Antonio, Arenal volcano-view platforms near La Fortuna, Playa Santa Teresa on the Nicoya Peninsula, and Nosara's Playa Pelada. Covers Costa Rica proposal packages ($200 to $600 for eco-lodge setup, $800 to $2,500 full-service), proposal photographer costs ($150 to $400), best times (January to March ideal, green season underrated for privacy), and total costs from $320. Includes a comparison table of five settings and a seven-question FAQ.
- [Nicaragua](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/nicaragua): Best proposal spots in Nicaragua
- [Hawaii](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/hawaii): Best proposal spots in Hawaii
- [Paris](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/paris): Best proposal spots in Paris, including the Trocadero upper terrace, Pont de Bir-Hakeim mid-span, Pont Alexandre III, Square du Vert-Galant on Ile de la Cite, Sacre-Coeur stairs at dawn, and private Seine bateau experiences. Covers paris proposal spots, golden-hour windows (8:15pm in June, 7:45pm in September), Eiffel Tower light show schedule, photo permit requirements for the Tuileries, private bateau rental options, where to stay (7th, 4th, 1st arrondissements), and costs from $650 to $4,300+. Includes a seven-setting comparison table and eight-question FAQ.
- [United States](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/united-states): Best proposal spots across the United States
- [Patagonia](https://www.proposalspots.com/destinations/patagonia): Best proposal spots in Patagonia, spanning Chilean and Argentine Patagonia. Top settings include Mirador Base Las Torres at sunrise in Torres del Paine (Chile), Mirador Británico in the French Valley on the W trek, the Salto Grande / Lago Pehoé viewpoint (drive-up Cuernos backdrop), Laguna de los Tres at Fitz Roy from El Chaltén (Argentina), the Mirador de los Cóndores above El Chaltén (easy-access Fitz Roy panorama), the Perito Moreno glacier boardwalks at Los Glaciares National Park, and Cerro Campanario above Bariloche (year-round chairlift summit). Covers Patagonia proposal packages ($630 to $1,620 for the moment with photographer and park access; $1,050 to $4,950+ with lodge stays), photographer tips ($400 to $900 with local Puerto Natales / El Chaltén / El Calafate photographers strongly preferred), best times (late February to mid-March for Torres del Paine wind calm; November and early December for Fitz Roy clarity; 1pm to 4pm for Perito Moreno calving), CONAF park entry booking through pasesparques.cl (~$35 USD high season), wind extremes of 80-110 km/h on exposed ridges in December and January, helicopter charters from $4,000+, and the Chilean vs. Argentine side decision. Includes a six-setting comparison table and an eight-question FAQ covering where to propose, costs, timing, photographer hiring, Chile vs. Argentina, trip length, and package contents.

## Planning Guides

- [How to Plan a Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/how-to-plan-a-proposal): Complete step-by-step planning guide
- [Romantic Proposal Ideas](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/romantic-proposal-ideas): Ideas by setting, relationship style, and budget
- [Best Destinations to Propose](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/best-destinations-to-propose): Top destinations worldwide ranked by setting and season
- [Proposal Packages](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/proposal-packages): What proposal packages include and what they cost
- [Proposal Set-Up](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/proposal-set-up): How to set up a proposal scene
- [Picnic Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/picnic-proposal): How to plan a picnic proposal
- [Beach Proposal Packages](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/beach-proposal-packages): Guide to beach proposal packages
- [Beach Wedding Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/beach-wedding-proposal): How to plan a beach proposal
- [Romantic Dinner Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/romantic-dinner-proposal): How to propose at a restaurant
- [Destination Engagement Photographer](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/destination-engagement-photographer): How to find and hire one
- [Proposal Planner](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/proposal-planner): When a proposal planner is worth hiring, what they cost, and what to ask before signing
- [Outdoor Proposal Ideas](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/outdoor-proposal-ideas): Hikes, beaches, gardens, vineyards, parks, and how to pick the right one
- [Girlfriend Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/girlfriend-proposal): How to propose to your girlfriend, the questions to ask yourself first, and the moment that fits her
- [Helicopter Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/helicopter-proposal): When a helicopter proposal works, when it doesn't, what it costs, and how to do it without ruining the audio
- [Engagement Planning](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/engagement-planning): A calm timeline for the first 48 hours, first month, and first six months after the proposal
- [Unique Proposal Ideas](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/unique-proposal-ideas): Specificity beats creativity. Ideas built around private details of the relationship rather than borrowed formats
- [Surprise Proposal Planning](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/surprise-proposal-planning): How to keep a proposal secret. Hiding the ring, briefing vendors, and the cover story that holds
- [Engagement Photo Locations](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/engagement-photo-locations): How to choose a location that looks like your life, by setting, light, and season
- [Beach Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/beach-proposal): How to plan a proposal on the beach, from timing the tide and light to handling sand, wind, and an audience of strangers
- [Best Places to Propose in Europe](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/best-places-to-propose-in-europe): A guide to Europe's strongest proposal settings, including Santorini, Paris, the South of France, the Amalfi Coast, Portugal, the Swiss Alps, and London, with a comparison table and FAQ
- [The Marry Me Proposal](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/marry-me-proposal): Which marry me formats actually work, which ones backfire, what they cost, and how to do the big gesture without handing the moment to a crowd
- [Private Engagement Proposal Ideas](https://www.proposalspots.com/blog/private-engagement-proposal-ideas): Private engagement proposal ideas that feel intimate, not small. Where to go, how to plan around privacy, and when a quiet proposal is the right call
